A product that enables, like, AirBite is a data integration platform, right?
Like, you can integrate over 600 tools into a data warehouse.
And if you think about regulated industries, like, they've been largely left out of the cloud because they can't really just, like, plug in whatever they want.
And so we're launching what we call hybrid deployments.
This is not something that, we're the first in the industry of doing it in a way we do it.
Like, it's a product that already exists, like, Fivetran has it.
But essentially what it is, is, like, you can spin up an AirBite instance in the cloud.

If you have customers in France, the data sits in France and so on and so forth.
